specificity.note: Names the exact node (obtainableFactor), the 3% benchmark, the 0.01 band floor, a concrete perturbation to 0.008, the buyer cell (cust.operator-large), specific gates (AVL/RVL, framework negotiation), and monitorable venues (TED award notices, operator supplier portals) with numeric thresholds.

nonObviousness.note: Goes beyond 'band edge could bind' by naming a NEW structural reason: the funnel models obtainable pace and buyer mix as independent sliders while the declared GTM makes them negatively correlated, and the whyMissable field correctly notes the 6%→3% revision makes the box look already checked. Docked one point because the corpus had already surfaced the 0.001–0.1% hardware-entrant analogues, so part of the direction was on the table.

mechanismDepth.note: Three-step chain (GTM concentration → benchmark lacks qualification-cycle specificity → effective factor below band floor) is referenced at each hop and each link is independently plausible. The final quantitative leap to 'order of magnitude below 3%' is the weakest arrow, and the risk's own evidence revision concedes the 1% Year-1 convention recalibrates that framing.

evidenceQuality.note: Two independent corroborations on the key premise (AVL/RVL qualification gates are real; SOM is a function of sales cycle and buyer mix per profitjets/prospeo), with an honestly-flagged 'contested' status and a disclosed contradicting stance. The Prospeo 1%-Year-1 benchmark undercuts the magnitude claim (3x, not 10x), and no direct rack-PDU quantitative case anchors the ~0.001% floor.

decisionRelevance.note: Directly changes next-two-quarter sequencing: run distributor/OEM channels in parallel to decorrelate Year-1 cash, and execute the operator-interview rebuild of obtainableFactor pre-launch. Both indicators (own CRM qualification elapsed time, TED publication-to-award medians) are concrete and monitorable now.
